_comment: Seedance 2.0 (fal.ai) shot list — strategist plan wired in. image_url/end_image_url/image_urls must be PUBLIC URLs (host the app-screen stills on Firebase first; replace every REPLACE_* token). Stills needed: S1 social-map, S2 social-profile-sheet, S3 live-map-night, S5 live-perk-redeemed, S6 events-booth-map, S7 events-DRW-reply, S8 events-vendor-card. HERO (id=hero-plate) needs NO stills and can run immediately. Dry-run: `node scripts/gen_seedance_videos.mjs`.

shots.title: SOCIAL — tap-to-reveal (S1 -> S2)
shots.prompt: Cinematic vertical shot of a phone showing a clean dark map UI (warm near-black #0a0a0c) with a few labeled venue cards and the user's own marker — no scattered dots, no radar. Slow push-in. At 2s a fingertip taps a venue card; a frosted bottom sheet rises and interest-tagged profile cards fade in one by one. Soft cyan (#22d3ee) accent glow, bone-white text, premium minimal UI, crisp and legible, dusk mood. Leave top third clear for a caption.

shots.title: HERO — 'your city' atmosphere plate (NO UI)
shots.note: Full-bleed loop behind the page's CSS radar overlay. No stills needed — can generate as soon as FAL_KEY is set.
shots.prompt: Slow cinematic aerial drift over Long Beach at blue-hour dusk — harbor, the Queen Mary silhouette, low warm city lights coming on, gentle haze. Warm near-black grade, deep shadows, faint amber glow on the horizon. Calm, premium, hopeful. Seamless loop, minimal motion, no text, no UI, no map graphics.

shots.title: LIVE — Swag Bag / LB$ (S3 -> [S4] -> S5)
shots.note: 3-state storyboard compressed to start(S3)->end(S5); middle Swag-Bag beat (S4) is prompt-driven. If the mid beat is unfaithful, switch this shot to reference-to-video with [S3,S4,S5].
shots.prompt: Vertical shot, phone in hand, downtown Long Beach neon bokeh on the glass at night. Screen shows a clean dark map UI with venue markers — no dots, no radar. At 2s a reward card slides in with a soft shimmer; at 4s it transitions to a Swag Bag with a glowing perk card and a rising credit balance; at 6s a thumb taps confirm and it flips to redeemed with a small magenta (#d957f7) particle burst. Warm-dark grade, bone text, aspirational nightlife, legible UI.

shots.title: EVENTS — Ask DRW (S6 -> [S7] -> S8)
shots.note: 3-state storyboard compressed to start(S6)->end(S8); middle DRW-reply beat (S7) is prompt-driven. If unfaithful, switch to reference-to-video with [S6,S7,S8]. DRW is intent/keyword-based — booths/skills, never 'find the person who looks like...'.
shots.prompt: Vertical over-the-shoulder shot, person holding a phone on a bright convention expo floor, booths softly blurred behind, Long Beach convention center daylight. Screen shows a clean dark map of booth markers with an orange (#f97316) accent — no dots, no radar. At 2s a concierge panel slides up, a short text query types in, an AI reply appears; at 4s a booth marker pulses orange; at 6s a thumb taps it and a vendor card expands. Confident, modern, daytime B2B energy, warm-dark UI, legible.

shots.title: SIZZLE — brand film, multi-shot, native audio
shots.note: @Image1=S6 orange booth map, @Image2=S7 DRW reply, @Image3=S1 cyan map, @Image4=S2 profile sheet, @Image5=S5 perk redeeming. Reuses the same stills as the mode slots.
shots.prompt: 15s cinematic brand film, 16:9, warm near-black grade throughout. Open on a slow aerial of Long Beach at sunrise, soft amber. Cut to a bright expo floor — a phone showing @Image1 (orange booth map) then @Image2 (DRW answering). At 5s cut to a venue at dusk — a phone showing @Image3 (cyan map, clean markers, no dots) tapped to reveal @Image4 (a profile sheet rising). At 9s cut to downtown Long Beach at night, neon bokeh — a phone showing @Image5 (a perk redeeming, magenta). At 13s end on a calm dark field with clean negative space for a logo. Cohesive sunrise to night color story, premium, minimal, no on-screen text, no dots, no radar graphics. Audio: one continuous bed evolving dawn-ambient to day-optimistic to dusk-warm to night-pulse, UI SFX on each tap/confirm, final whoosh. Optional brand VO: 'Your city, live.' (open) / 'Sonar. Now in beta.' (close). No fake-spokesperson lip-sync.
